camera: Straight top-down (bird's-eye) view, ship's nose pointing up toward the top of the frame, centered and filling most of the frame.
style: Bold, clean digital illustration style with strong silhouette and clear edges, moderate detail (not photorealistic clutter), dramatic rim lighting, slightly stylized rather than photoreal, visible panel seams/rivets for an industrial sci-fi feel.
palette: Exact colors vary per ship/faction — always specified in the asset description below, not fixed here. Keep colors saturated and high-contrast against the dark background so each faction's silhouette and color reads clearly at a glance.
background: Simple, smooth radial gradient from dark navy (#2f3b52) to near-black — no stars, no nebula, no other objects — so the asset reads clearly as an icon/sprite at small sizes.
constraints: Square 1:1 composition. No text, no logos, no watermarks, no UI elements, no drop shadow outside the subject.
